MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE: ATTY DANA K. OIUM OF OIUM REYEN & PRYOR TEL NO. 415-392-8300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- DEFENDANT RITIK CHANDRA, M.D.'s Motion To Compel Compliance With Court Order And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiffs shall provide verified, objection-free responses to all discovery requests at issue in this Motion within two week of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $1,425 are awarded against plaintiffs in favor of Defendant Chandra. Sanctions shall be paid within one week of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
